Once the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of [[Redhaven]], '''Tamaktis Breetha''' quickly became a member of an [[Rhommamoolian Senate|independent senate]] on [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]] run by [[Nom Anor]]. He, along with [[Shok Tinoktin]] escorted [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] to a meeting with the costumed Nom Anor. He was considerably more moderate than the extreme Anor and Tinoktin.
